releaseNotes: - Added a button to open the project folder and reload all projects to relevant views.
- Text size of TextItemFormated can be changed.
- Added the possibility to turn TimerDisplay decorations on or off.
- Added the qmldir directory to the QML import path as well.
- Fixed a deadlock in the image compress Tool.
- Fixed a crash with the tag overlay if no Resources are selected.
- Multiple small code editor fixes concerning completion, zoom, folding and error list.
- Fixed issues with accidentally interrupting Sounds when not intended.
